title: Federal Bank International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Federal Bank International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Federal Bank International Enterprises family as a Credit Analyst in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Federal Bank International Enterprises:
Federal Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank International Enterprises!
